title: ctenopteris circumvallata
intro: Ctenopteris circumvallata, also known as the wall fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ctenopteris circumvallata include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ctenopteris circumvallata can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
